title: Sneak Push
description: Sneak-Push Mechanic Hold Sneak and Left-Click to harmlessly shove mobs away instead of attacking them.
body:
# Tactical Shove
Tired of accidentally punching villagers when trying to nudge them into their trading stalls? Need to peacefully move a cow out of your doorway, or perhaps you just want toyeet a Creeper off a cliff without risking an explosion?

**Tactical Shove is a simple, lightweight utility mod that turns your attack into a non-lethal push mechanism when you need it most.**

- Key Features
Sneak to Push: While holding sneak (default: Shift), left-clicking on any living entity will push them away from you instead of dealing damage.

Safe Interaction: Perfect for managing villagers, moving pets, or organizing livestock without ever hurting them.

Universal Compatibility: Works on passive mobs, hostile monsters, and other players.

Configuration
We know that sometimes you need a gentle nudge, and sometimes you need a massive shove. The mod is fully configurable to suit your playstyle:

Push Strength: Easily adjust a value in the config file to determine exactly how much force is applied. Set it to a tiny bump or send mobs flying!
